products.title: BMW 3 Series G20 LCI 2023 Onwards Front Bumper Trims / M Sport / M340
products.body_html:
BMW 3 Series G20 LCI 2023 Onwards Front Bumper Trims / M Sport / M340

High-quality front bumper with grilles for the BMW 3 Series G20 LCI 2023-onwards, including M340 models. Designed to match OEM fitment and provide a direct replacement solution.

✅ Key Features

  • Front bumper assembly with lower and side grilles included

  • Compatible with BMW 3 Series G20 LCI 2023-onwards

  • Fits M-Sport M340 trim and variants

  • Precision fitment for direct replacement

  • Strong and durable construction

  • Painted but may need re-spray to match your paint code

📦 What’s Included

  • 1 x Front Bumper (LCI style)

  • Integrated lower and side grilles

❗ Important Notes

  • Suitable for BMW 3 Series G20 LCI models from 2023 onwards (including M-Tek and M340)

  • Please confirm compatibility with your vehicle before purchase

  • Professional installation recommended — we can take care of the fitting and re-spray for you at our garage

  • This is an aftermarket replacement part
